---
title: "\'The American Sanitary Commission\'"
---

## \'The American Sanitary Commission\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1866
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Christian Remembrancer</i> Vol 52 (Oct. 1866): 296-323

### Notes

Identified in a letter (20-03-1869) to Alexander Macmillan, MS British Library Add MSS 54920: 227-8

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
